sources.display_name: Kaggle Massive Stock News Analysis DB
sources.name: kaggle_stock_news
sources.real_ingestion_notes: Use the Kaggle API or a pre-downloaded dataset archive; preserve source publication timestamps and dataset snapshot version.

sources.name: finnhub_open_data
sources.real_ingestion_notes: Use API-key-backed endpoints where required; capture request parameters, symbol universe, response status, and provider timestamp.

sources.name: alpha_vantage
sources.real_ingestion_notes: Use function-specific endpoints; handle free-tier throttling, compact versus full output size, and explicit symbol/date parameters.

sources.name: tiingo
sources.real_ingestion_notes: Use token-authenticated REST endpoints; keep ticker metadata separate from historical bars and store split/dividend adjustment fields.
